TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sim_Bhullar, title = Sim_Bhullar, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sim_Bhullar} }

S.FORM: Sim Bhullar sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 12, Sim Bhullar, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Sim Bhullar sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 12, Sim Bhullar, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~ɕim βħullar s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, s~ɕim βħullar, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
